note: Run-7 is the first enforcement pass after the Wave3 P0 security sprint (56 P0s claimed fixed). Net total dropped from 380 to 346 (-34), but --strict FAILS: 8+ new P0 regressions discovered including EM-AUD-001 re-opening, 4 new EF-ORG P0s, 2 new EM-IMG P0s, and EM-EMR-004. Wave3 confirmed 18 P0s resolved (imaging FK, imaging auth, key audit contracts). Domain event infrastructure (DE-001..DE-023) remains 0% wired across all 11 modules.
baseline_coverage_note: 346 = 137 EM (module-level) + 130 EF (file-level) + 31 EX (cross-module) + 26 TR (traceability) + 21 AL (audit compliance) + 1 EC (coverage note — EC covered separately in ENFORCEMENT_COVERAGE.md). EM: 11 modules, EF: 11 modules, EX: exhaustive cross-module scan, TR: Phase D graph, AL: 25 AUDIT_CONTRACTS.md contracts.

ratchet_summary.strict_violation_reason: 8 new P0 regressions vs run-6 baseline: EM-AUD-001 (dentist_owner locked out of audit viewer — incorrectly marked resolved in run-6), EM-EMR-004 (DB FK constraint violation in emr.schema.ts), EF-ORG-P015 (recoverPin missing assertBranchAccess — cross-branch PIN reset), EF-ORG-P016 (fee schedule + audit log handlers not implemented), EF-ORG-P017 (memberStatusEnum missing 'invited'/'revoked'), EF-ORG-P018 (TIER_LIMIT_REACHED not in ERROR_TAXONOMY), EM-IMG-008 (AC-IMG-002/003 structurally untestable — SM state divergence), EM-IMG-014 (observability hooks absent — dental-imaging.tier-blocked never emitted).
ratchet_summary.notes: Wave3 confirmed resolves: EF-IMG-001..005 (5 ceph assertBranchRole P0s fixed), EF-IMG-006 (imaging_finding FK removed), EF-IMG-007/009/010 (coverage/tier/filesize), EX-007+EX-031 (imaging_finding cross-module FK — confirmed bare UUID), AL-006 (patient export audit), AL-007 (appointment book audit), AL-011 (imaging study upload audit), AL-012 (imaging study access audit), EF-ORG-001..004 (branch auth fixed), EF-ORG-011/012 (test coverage added), EF-PMD-008 (barrel export added). Wave3 defects: AL-003/AL-004 fixes applied to wrong/unrouted handlers — canonical routes still unaudited. 12 new P1 regressions across dental-imaging schema (4 new EF-IMG), dental-clinical (new EM-CLI P0 upgrades). Domain events (DE-001..DE-023) 0% wired — 23 P1 EX findings (EX-008..030) known and unchanged.
